title: Force_ClearTrigger Statement
description:
Use Force_ClearTrigger to clear all conditions for the current force sensor's trigger.

Note

This command will only work if the Force Sensing option (ATI Force Sensor) is installed.

When using Force Sensor from EPSON, use each command of following manual.

     EPSON RC+ 7.0 Option Force Guide 7.0 SPEL+ Language Reference
see_also:
Force_Sensor

Force_SetTrigger

Force_ClearTrigger
